sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 8:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 8:1
items.html: Equivalence of form between two spiritual entities is adhesion, and disparity of form between them makes them not adhered to one another.
